review_title: My Best AI Purchase To Date for Multimedia
description: I started off with Teir 3 and then maxed out. In fact, if I found I used all the credits each month on what I now have, I would have bought another account when it came around to appsumo. I'm extremely delighted with the product and am thrilled the company continuously makes improvements.
author: Kenneth K.
pros: The amazing creativity and diversity of each generation is unlike any other app I have used.
cons: I wish there were more realistic voices. However, there are a sufficient amount, but at least for American English, it would be helpful if more were added, especially for when we need several voices in a clip. I also wish there was a way for me to connect my Play.HT voices and choose from those as well. But to be clear, these are not major issues, and they are likely ideas the company is looking at anyway.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reelcraft making ai video generation a reality
description: Overall it as been a very positive experience. Iam an early adopter, I got the service when it was first launched on appsumo. The support is friendly and active, new features and models keep getting added to the service, the discord group is quite active
author: Miguel C.
pros: I love reelcraft ease of use, we just need a very basic initial idea and reelcraft engine takes care of everything else for us
cons: Sometimes the generations fail due to server errors and need to wait a few hours until iam able to complete the video
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Interesting, but not great. I hope they create more real-world use cases so we can get more use out of the software.
author: omar Y.
pros: It's amazing for those working in the blind.
cons: If you know what you want it rarely gives me what I'm looking for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The real truth about realcraft ai
description: Very impressed with the capabilities of realcraft. I was very pleasantly surprised quickly upgraded my account because of its usefulness And a high quality of the results. I like the use cases for animated content very much.
author: Anthony L.
pros: Makes the AI video creating process less frustrating because of their character feature. With the character feature, you're able to specify each character in each scene which is a complete game changer.
cons: After the video has been generated the video editor is very bare Bones. If you want to do substantial edits to the post generated video, you'd have to use another editor.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Up there with the best AI video generators.
description: It improves with each output. Really pleased with the UI.
author: Vikas P.
pros: I subscribed to and cancelled Reelcraft a couple of times but kept coming back to my defunct account as I missed it so much. It really is a quality interface and if you spend some time with the prompts (or let Reelcraft's magic do its thing) then it produces some splendid work.
cons: The output has continued to improve with time but can still be a bit hit and miss but good overall. The production of the video can take some time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: You can still clearly see that reelcraft.ai is still in its infancy. But I see a good development. One or two things are sure to be added. But for me, it's completely suitable for producing faceless videos. I'm looking forward to the developments that are still to come. Please continue with the improvements. :) My recommendation definitely goes out for this
author: Jessica G.
pros: Super easy to operate. I really like the functions so far. And what's on the roadmap makes me want more.
cons: A few things aren't quite running smoothly yet, but otherwise I'm really happy with it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reelcraft Allows Me to Explore My Creativity
description: The best kind of tool is the one we use and I think Reelcraft has really excelled at giving me a platform to be able to express my creativity on the internet for the very first time with confidence and skill I need. I can really make my dreams come to life once I get the prompts and elements right, and to me it's pretty magical. Not perfect, but true creativity can be messy!
author: Christian A.
pros: I think the people and the way they try to engage with customers is what really convinced me about the viability of the tool. If there isn't a commitment to helping customers, the tool will lack the supportive impact it needs to really makes a difference. The tool itself is amazing as well!
cons: Can be a bit slow, but patience is the key to tools like these.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Creating video with Reelcraft is more easier thank you think. New AI revolution
description: I am highest tier customer at Reelcraft and I must say it very unique and amazing app with great support by small but very energetic people. If you love video creation then Reelcraft is must as it will same lots of time with quality output.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Its most unique and amazing app which creates entire story or video with single click. Its fast, high level accuracy, lovely support people who are working round the clock for their customers.
cons: Nothing specifically but I want its standard version animation like pro level without gold credit, separate text to video or image to video of kling model and faster speed.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Its been great. The staff have been really helpful and its help me grow my youtube channel and take out the massive time of video editing.
author: Jamie P.
pros: Control of my storyboard and the ability to generate animations for each scene
cons: Processing time or failed processing happens
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am pleased to share that I have had a highly satisfactory experience with ReelCraft.ai. Having worked on several projects utilizing this innovative tool, I am now eager to incorporate it as one of the essential tools in my newly established technology consultancy company. ReelCraft.ai is an advanced AI-powered video generation tool that simplifies the process of creating engaging and professional videos. With its user-friendly interface and powerful features, ReelCraft.ai offers numerous benefits for technology consultancy companies and individuals
author: Helgurd M.
pros: User-Friendly Interface, Simplified Video Creation.Streamlined Video Creation Process. Powerful AI Capabilities. Time and Effort Savings. Bring any ideas to live. Cost-Effectiveness. High-Quality Output
cons: I have no complaints. Nevertheless, each person will evaluate apps according to their own requirements.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Revolutionary Animation Tool - A Game Changer
description: My overall experience with ReelCraft.ai has been outstanding. The platform has significantly simplified the animation creation process, allowing me to focus more on storytelling rather than technical details. The support team is responsive and helpful, making sure any issues are quickly resolved. ReelCraft has truly transformed the way I create and share animated content, making it accessible and enjoyable. I highly recommend it to anyone looking to bring their stories to life with ease and creativity.
author: Jaswant S.
pros: ReelCraft.ai is incredibly user-friendly and intuitive, making it easy for anyone to create professional-grade animated videos in just minutes. The AI-powered text-to-animation feature is simply phenomenal, transforming simple text into visually stunning animations effortlessly. I love the wide range of customization options, from various animation styles to custom voiceovers and background music. The freemium model is also a great way to get started without any initial cost, and the upgrade options are very affordable.
cons: There is honestly very little to criticize about ReelCraft.ai. However, one minor improvement could be the addition of more advanced editing tools for users who want to dive deeper into the animation process. Also, expanding the library of background music and voiceover options would be a great enhancement.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I was very taken with the way that reelcraft is able to extract features of a story that might visualize well. This is something I haven't encountered in other tools and it sets it apart. It also made it fun to use, as it exposed aspects of the story that I might not have thought about in a particular way.
author: Blake H.
pros: I really like the way Reelcraft is able to organize a story told in natural language into scenes, that then can in turn be used to synthesize images. This is a very imaginative way to set up the functionality and it works surprisingly well. The images/animation generated for the scenes is not bad, although not as good as some other generators.
cons: I would like to have more ability to edit/adapt the scenes once a story has been automatically divided up into scenes, rather than having to go back and rewrite the story. This seems to me that it would be a more natural way of working and make revisions easier.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I can put my imagination into pictures.
author: Chad M.
pros: Engaging virtual characters. fun, excitement
cons: Limited customization options. movements
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I’m overall happy with its performance but I’m also happy that the design was better than most

pros: It’s speed is a factor that is most important
cons: The glitches are so annoying that they are not allowed in my room anymore so
